actions.description: Ninth board meeting. Platform stable — zero bugs, 5 games verified across 3 QA cycles. Shifted focus to growth (game #6 research) and hardening (Security P2s, frontend Docker, UX/UI build discipline). Flagged UX/UI untested shipping as risk.

nextStep: Next meeting: check game #6 research progress, Security P2 fix status, frontend Docker hardening.
